brand.purpose: The 'Sandcastle' wordmark only; gradient-filled, heaviest and tightest type in the app.

body.purpose: Feed text, prompts, descriptions; compact by design.

label.purpose: Uppercase key/value chrome on status chips only.

mono.purpose: Anything machine-generated: tool summaries, URLs, generated source.

gradients.name: brand
gradients.purpose: The sand->azure brand gradient. Scoped to the wordmark and the primary Build button ONLY.

gradients.name: user-bubble
gradients.purpose: Fill for the right-aligned user message bubble in the activity feed.

gradients.name: bg-spotlights
gradients.value: radial-gradient(1100px 600px at 12% -8%, rgba(56,189,248,0.14), transparent 60%), radial-gradient(900px 500px at 100% 0%, rgba(246,193,119,0.12), transparent 55%)
gradients.purpose: The two soft azure/sand spotlights washing the deep-navy body background.

shadows.name: brand-glow
shadows.purpose: Azure halo under the brand mark only.

shadows.name: toast-lift
shadows.purpose: The only true drop shadow; lifts the transient toast above the workspace.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover/active transforms on cards and buttons.

breakpoints.name: stack
breakpoints.purpose: Below this, the two-pane workspace stacks vertically (left over right).

components.name: Primary Button (Build)
components.description: The one loud control: brand-gradient fill, dark ink text. Exactly one on screen at a time.
components.css: .ds-build { padding: 0 20px; height: 44px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Inter, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13.5px; color: #06121f; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f6c177 0%, #38bdf8 100%); transition: transform 0.12s, filter 0.15s; } .ds-build:hover:not(:disabled) { filter: brightness(1.08); } .ds-build:active:not(:disabled) { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-build:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions (Share, New app): transparent with a hairline stroke.
components.css: .ds-ghost { padding: 5px 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14); background: transparent; color: #e7ecf6; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Metadata pill with an uppercase muted label and an ink value. Status only, never a control.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 5px 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); font-family: Inter, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; } .ds-chip-label { color: #8b95ab; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; } .ds-chip-value { color: #e7ecf6; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Agent Badge
components.description: Icon-led pill in the active agent's hue (azure Planner / sand Builder / green Fixer). The load-bearing signal of the activity feed.
components.css: .ds-agent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: Inter, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 700; border: 1px solid transparent; } .ds-agent-ico { font-size: 13px; } .ds-agent-planner { color: #38bdf8; background: rgba(56,189,248,0.12); border-color: rgba(56,189,248,0.35); }

components.name: Prompt Input
components.description: The build prompt field: translucent fill, hairline stroke, azure focus border (no glow).
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; resize: none; padding: 11px 13px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); color: #e7ecf6; font-family: Inter, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.4; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #38bdf8; }

components.name: Gallery Card
components.description: Example-gallery card: flat translucent, azure-tinted lift on hover. No shadow.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; text-align: left; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); color: #e7ecf6; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.12s, border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.14); background: rgba(56,189,248,0.07); } .ds-card-emoji { font-size: 24px; } .ds-card-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; } .ds-card-prompt { font-size: 11.5px; color: #8b95ab; line-height: 1.4; }

narrative.overview: Sandcastle is a dark, calm operations surface built to be watched. Deep-navy glass panels, hairline borders, and dense compact type let the frame recede so the live activity inside (agents streaming plans and tool calls, a self-heal loop going green, an app rendering) is the only thing that draws the eye. Color is information, not decoration: each agent owns a hue, and the sand->azure brand gradient appears only in the wordmark and the Build button. Depth is tonal — translucency, backdrop blur, and 1px borders — not shadows. It rejects the plain-LLM-chatbox reflex, the sterile enterprise dashboard, and any magic-black-box polish that would hide the work.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, backlit, glass-paneled two-pane workspace; frame recedes, live content leads.
Semantic per-agent color (azure / sand / green), always paired with icon + label.
One brand gradient (sand->azure), scoped to wordmark + primary CTA only.
Flat, tonal depth: translucency + hairline borders + backdrop blur, not shadow ramps.
Compact fixed-px product scale; Inter for UI, JetBrains Mono for anything real.

rules.name: The One Gradient Rule
rules.body: The sand->azure brand gradient appears in exactly two places: the wordmark and the primary Build button. Never as text fill elsewhere, never on body/data, never as a decorative wash.

rules.name: The Color-Is-Meaning Rule
rules.body: Azure = Planner/interactive, Sand = Builder, Green = Fixer/success, Violet = grounding/user, Red = error. Color signals which agent or state you're looking at, and every colored element also carries an icon or label so meaning survives grayscale and color-blindness.

rules.name: The Mono-Means-Real Rule
rules.body: Anything machine-generated (tool summaries, URLs, generated source) is set in JetBrains Mono; human prose is set in Inter. The font is a truth signal.

rules.name: The Flat-Glass Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat translucent glass at rest. Convey depth with translucency, blur, and hairline borders, not box-shadow. The brand-mark glow and the toast lift are the whole shadow budget.

dos: Do keep color semantic and pair every colored element with an icon or label.
Do confine the sand->azure gradient to the wordmark and the Build button.
Do set machine output in JetBrains Mono and human prose in Inter.
Do build depth from translucency, backdrop blur, and 1px hairline borders.
Do keep transitions quick and state-conveying (120-200ms).
Do keep exactly one primary (Build) action on screen at a time.
Do treat muted #8b95ab as the contrast risk and verify >=4.5:1 on its real surface.
Do self-host Inter + JetBrains Mono if cross-machine brand fidelity matters.
donts: Don't collapse the agent process into a single chat bubble or plain LLM text box.
Don't turn it into a sterile enterprise SaaS dashboard (KPI-card grids, hero-metric template).
Don't fake or hide the artifact; the Code tab and live preview prove it's real.
Don't use background-clip: text gradient fill anywhere except the wordmark.
Don't add colored border-left/right stripes; use full hairline borders and background tints.
Don't add drop shadows beyond the brand-mark glow and the toast, or lift surfaces on hover.
Don't add display/serif fonts or spend a signal hue on decoration.
Don't ship motion without a prefers-reduced-motion fallback (a current gap).
